zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Croxton Carter於1495年出生在英國英格蘭貝德福爾肯普斯頓時，他的父親Sir John William Nicholas de Carter20歲，母親Martha Croxton26歲。他於1517年與Emily Anscell在英國賀特福爾基帕菲特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1544年7月在他的家鄉享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭貝德福爾貝德福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Croxton Carter于1495年出生在英国英格兰貝德福爾肯普斯頓时，他的父亲Sir John William Nicholas de Carter20岁，母亲Martha Croxton26岁。他于1517年与Emily Anscell在英国賀特福爾基帕菲特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1544年7月在他的家乡享年49岁，埋葬在英国英格兰貝德福爾貝德福德。

nameMeanings.name: Carter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a transporter of goods, from Middle English carter(e) ‘carter’ (Anglo-Norman French car(e)tier, Old French charetier, medieval Latin carettarius, carettator). The Old French word coalesced with the earlier Middle English word cart(e) ‘cart’, which is from either Old Norse kartr or Old English cræt, both of which, like the Late Latin word, were probably derived from Celtic. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
Irish: shortened form of   McCarter  .
Americanized form of German   Karter   ‘carder’.

variants.name: Charman
meanings: English (Sussex and Surrey): occupational name for a carter, carrier, or coachman, from Middle English (Old French) char, car ‘car, cart, carriage’ + Middle English man ‘man’. Compare Carter and Carman 2.

English (Sussex and Surrey): occupational name for someone who did odd jobs, from Middle English char(re), chere (Old English cier(r), cer(r), cear(r), cær(r)) ‘turn (of activity), small job, chore’ + man. Compare Carman 2.
In some cases probably also an Americanized form of Slovenian Čarman (see Carman 5).

variants.name: Chartier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Normand, Jacques, Marcel, Adelard, Alcide, Emile, Gilles, Raoul, Rosaire, Alphonse.
French: shortened form of charretier, an occupational name for a carter, from an agent derivative of Old French charette ‘cart’.
French Canadian: altered form of English   Carter  , a cognate of 1 above. Compare   Sharkey   and   Shorkey  .

variants.name: Karter
meanings: German: occupational name for a carder (someone who prepares wool for spinning), from Middle High German karter. Compare Carter .

variants.name: McCarter
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   McArthur  .

variants.name: Carrier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Marcel, Emile, Lucien, Cecile, Alain, Gaetan, Gilles, Jacques, Laurent, Normand.

English and southern French: from Middle English, Old French car(r)ier (from Late Latin carrarius, a derivative of carrum ‘cart, wagon’, a word of Gaulish origin), an occupational name for a carter (see Carter ), in French also for a cartwright. Compare French Charrier .
French: occupational name for a stonemason or quarryman, carrier. Compare Coyer .

variants.name: Cartman
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): occupational name from Middle English cartman ‘man who operated a cart for the transport of goods’. Compare Carter .
Americanized form of German Kartmann (see Kartman ).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: Croxton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places in Cambridgeshire, Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Leicestershire, Norfolk, and Staffordshire named Croxton, from the Old Norse personal name Krókr (see Crook 3) or an Old English word crōc ‘nook’ + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’.

variants.name: Crowston
meanings: English: habitational name from South Croxton or Croxton Kerrial (Leicestershire), traditionally pronounced /'krousən/; or possibly from a village so named in Lincolnshire. Compare   Croxton  .

variants.name: Crook
meanings: English:

topographic name from Old Norse krókr ‘nook or bend’ denoting someone who lived by a bend in a river or road. In some instances the surname may have arisen as a habitational name from any of the places called Crook in Cumberland and Durham, or Crooke in Lancashire, all of which are derived from this word.

topographic name for someone who lived ‘(at the) barrow or mound’ from Brittonic crüg. In some instances this may have arisen as a habitational name from either Crook in Combe Raleigh or perhaps Crooke in North Tawton (both Devon), which are derived from this word.

variants.name: Croston
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place in Lancashire named Croston, from Old Norse kross ‘cross’ or Old English cros + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’.
English: occasionally, a variant of   Croxton   or   Croson  .

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Croxton Carter was born in 1495, in Kempston, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John William Nicholas de Carter, was 20 and his mother, Martha Croxton, was 26. He married Emily Anscell in 1517, in Chipperfield, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died in July 1544, in his hometown, at the age of 49, and was buried in Bedford, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Croxton Carter est né en 1495, à Kempston, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John William Nicholas de Carter, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Martha Croxton, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Emily Anscell en 1517, à Chipperfield, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en juillet 1544, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Bedford, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Croxton Carter 1495 in Kempston, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John William Nicholas de Carter 20 und seine Mutter Martha Croxton 26. Er hat 1517 in Chipperfield, Hertfordshire, England Emily Anscell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb im Juli 1544 im Alter von 49 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Bedford, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Croxton Carter è nato il nel 1495 nel Kempston, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John William Nicholas de Carter, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Martha Croxton, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Emily Anscell nel 1517, nel Chipperfield, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel luglio 1544, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Croxton Carterが1495年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアケンプストンで生まれた時，父Sir John William Nicholas de Carterは20歳，母Martha Croxtonは26歳であった。1517年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアチップエルフィールドでEmily Anscellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1544年7月に故郷で49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアベドフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Croxton Carter(이)가 1495년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 케프스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John William Nicholas de Carter(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Martha Croxton(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1517년 영국 허트퍼드실르 치p르필드에서 Emily Anscell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1544년 7월 그의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 베드퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Croxton Carter nasceu em 1495, em Kempston, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John William Nicholas de Carter, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Martha Croxton, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Emily Anscell em 1517, em Chipperfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em julho de 1544, em sua cidade natal, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Croxton Carter родился в 1495 г. в местности кемпстон, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John William Nicholas de Carter было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Martha Croxton, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Emily Anscell в 1517 г. в местности чиппирфиелд, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер июль 1544 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности бедфорд, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Croxton Carter nació en 1495, en Kempston, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John William Nicholas de Carter, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Martha Croxton, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Emily Anscell en 1517, en Chipperfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en julio de 1544, en su pueblo, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
